title: sophora mollis subsp. sylvestris
intro: Sophora mollis subsp. sylvestris, also known as the Chinese Sophora or Yellow Sophora, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, native to China and used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant's root and seeds contain isoflavones, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Sophora mollis subsp. sylvestris include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antiviral activity against the herpes simplex virus. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or powder, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to support overall health and well-being.
